title: Iron Apples
body:
# Iron Apples
Hello! The functionality of this mod is to bring different apple types to the game somewhat like Iron Chests does for the game, but just with apples. Most apples have buffs, but the question is do they have drawbacks? Some do but that's for you the player to decide. Now other than just adding new foods to the game Iron Apples bring back the enchanted golden apple recipe. 

![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Iron-Apples.png)

![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Iron-Apple.png)

![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Enchanted-Iron-Apple.png)![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Copper-Apple.png)![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Enchanted-Copper-Apple.png)

![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Crystal-Apple.png)

![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Enchanted-Crystal-Apple.png)

![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Diamond-Apple.png)![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Enchanted-Diamond-Apple.png)![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Silver-Apple.png)![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Enchanted-Silver-Apple.png)![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Obsidian-Apple.png)![](https://github.com/Infer4Y/IronImages/raw/main/Enchanted-Obsidian-Apple.png)

This Mod was a request from the Minecraft Modding Development. It adds Iron Apples to the game which Is Craft-able with these recipes (Also Added the God Apple recipe back to the game).

Over Powered Crystal Apples can be crafted with Blocks that have the _**glassClear**_ ore dictionary on them. **Everyone Have Permission To Put This In Mod Packs**
